case_title: AVIGNON JULIAN LLC VS. KRISTOFFER MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVIGNON JULIAN LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, KRISTOFFER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 179 JULIAN AVENUE, NO. 10, SAN FRANCISCO, 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF AVIGNON JULIAN LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, KRISTOFFER
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVIGNON JULIAN LLC SERVED APR-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, KRISTOFFER
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, KRISTOFFER
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $26.19 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVIGNON JULIAN LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVIGNON JULIAN LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, KRISTOFFER DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, KRISTOFFER
